title: CachingStore: tests (TTL, eviction, zeroing)
description: Test CachingStore with an in-memory mock SecretStore. Tests: (1) get() serves from cache on second call within TTL — mock records call count, assert called once; (2) get() re-fetches after TTL expiry — use Duration::from_millis(1) TTL, sleep 2ms, assert mock called twice; (3) refresh() always calls inner.refresh() and updates cache; (4) put() calls inner.put() and subsequent get() returns new value without hitting inner; (5) TTL=0 — every get() calls inner; (6) concurrent gets on cold cache — assert backend not called more than N times (thundering herd is acceptable, just verify correctness). Mock must be independent oracle (not the code under test).
